error_signature: %error: <file>:<n>: number is missing value digits: <n>'sd <n> | localparam signed <bits> a1 = <n>'sd-<n>; | ^~~~~ %error: exiting due to <n> error(s)
raw_error_example:
%Error: output/biquad_df1.sv:20:46: Number is missing value digits: 16'sd
   20 |     localparam signed [COEFF_WIDTH-1:0] A1 = 16'sd-22387;
      |                                              ^~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
root_cause: A negative signed literal was incorrectly written with the sign inside the unsized literal (e.g., 16'sd-22387), which is not valid SystemVerilog syntax.
fix_rule: When declaring negative signed literals, place the minus sign before the width specifier (e.g., -16'sd22387) instead of after the base specifier. Ensure all literals follow proper Verilog/SystemVerilog numeric syntax.
fix_snippet:
localparam signed [COEFF_WIDTH-1:0] A1 = -16'sd22387;
localparam signed [COEFF_WIDTH-1:0] A2 = 16'sd8577;
